Home › Programmes › Diploma in Tourism Management
Diploma Programme

Diploma in
Tourism Management

The 2.5-year Diploma in Tourism Management at DIT prepares students for Malaysia's thriving tourism sector. Students gain expertise in destination management, sustainable tourism, cultural heritage, and digital innovation — ready for careers as destination managers, travel consultants, and event coordinators.

2.5 Years (Full Time) Intake: January, May & September
Enrol Now

Accreditation

Course Code: DTM MQA: FA9466 MOHE: KPT(R/1015/4/0008) HRDF Claimable International ✓

Why Choose DIT?

  • ✓ Full scholarship & job placements from partner hospitals
  • ✓ MOHE & MQA accredited programmes
  • ✓ 30+ years affiliated with Damai Service Hospital
  • ✓ Practical placements at approved hospitals

Advantages of Studying at DIT

MOHE & MQA Accredited — All programmes approved by Ministry of Higher Education
PTPTN Loans — Financial assistance available for eligible Malaysian students
Hostel Accommodation — Established condominiums with full facilities nearby
Guaranteed Job Placements — Scholarship partnerships with partner hospitals
Qualified Faculty — Registered lecturers and clinical instructors
30+ Years of Excellence — Affiliated with the established Damai Service Hospital

Entry Requirements

Local Students

SPM or equivalent with a minimum of THREE (3) Credits in any three subjects
OR Pass in SKM Level 3 in a related field and pass in SPM with minimum ONE (1) credit

International Students

GCE O Levels or equivalent with minimum Grade C in any THREE (3) subjects
AND IELTS with an overall band score of minimum 4.0
OR Equivalent: TOEFL / PTE / ELS / MUET / Cambridge English Qualifications

About This Programme

The 2.5-year Diploma in Tourism Management at DIT prepares students for Malaysia's thriving tourism sector. Students gain expertise in destination management, sustainable tourism, cultural heritage, and digital innovation — ready for careers as destination managers, travel consultants, and event coordinators.

Course Modules

1Semester 1

  • Principles of Management
  • Principles of Economics
  • Fundamentals of Marketing
  • Introduction to Hospitality & Tourism Industry
  • Appreciation of Ethics and Civilizations

2Semester 2

  • Principles of Tourism
  • Community Service
  • Advanced Communicative English
  • Islamic Studies / Moral Education

3Semester 3

  • Tourism Accounting
  • Tour Guiding
  • Customer Service
  • Thinking and Managing Ethically
  • Travel Agency & Operations
  • Tourism Geography

4Semester 4

  • Tourism Marketing
  • Tourism Environment
  • Ticketing and Reservations
  • Tourism Planning and Operations
  • Technology for Tourism Industry
  • Third Language II

5Semester 5

  • Human Resource Management
  • Supervision in Hospitality Industry
  • Restaurant Management
  • Food & Beverage Cost Control

7Semesters 6 & 7

  • Fundamentals of Entrepreneurship
  • Human Resource Management
  • Hospitality Law
  • Leadership and Team Building
  • Industrial Attachment

Career Prospects

Travel Coordinator / Travel ConsultantTicketing Executive / Sales ExecutiveHotel Marketing ExecutiveCustomer Service OfficerNational Tourism OfficerEvent Coordinator

Future Education Pathways

→Diploma → Bachelor of Hospitality Management
→Bachelor of Hotel Management
→Bachelor of International Hospitality Management
